---
title: "C++ 编程笔记"
---

::: {.tech-hero .cpp-hero}
## C++ 高性能生物计算

当 Python 和 R 的速度成为瓶颈时，C++ 是生物信息学高性能计算的首选。这里记录了我在序列分析、算法实现中的 C++ 经验。
:::

## 基础：序列处理

::: {.cpp-section}
### FASTA 文件解析器

```cpp
#include <iostream>
#include <fstream>
#include <string>
#include <vector>

struct Sequence {
    std::string header;
    std::string sequence;
};

class FastaReader {
public:
    std::vector<Sequence> read(const std::string& filename) {
        std::vector<Sequence> sequences;
        std::ifstream file(filename);
        std::string line, current_seq, current_header;

        while (std::getline(file, line)) {
            if (line.empty()) continue;

            if (line[0] == '>') {
                if (!current_header.empty()) {
                    sequences.push_back({current_header, current_seq});
                }
                current_header = line.substr(1);
                current_seq.clear();
            } else {
                current_seq += line;
            }
        }

        if (!current_header.empty()) {
            sequences.push_back({current_header, current_seq});
        }

        return sequences;
    }
};

int main() {
    FastaReader reader;
    auto seqs = reader.read("sequences.fa");
    std::cout << "Loaded " << seqs.size() << " sequences\n";
    return 0;
}
```
:::

## 进阶：序列比对算法

::: {.cpp-section}
### Smith-Waterman 局部比对

```cpp
#include <vector>
#include <algorithm>

class SmithWaterman {
    static constexpr int MATCH = 2;
    static constexpr int MISMATCH = -1;
    static constexpr int GAP = -2;

public:
    struct Result {
        int score;
        std::string aligned_seq1;
        std::string aligned_seq2;
    };

    Result align(const std::string& seq1, const std::string& seq2) {
        int m = seq1.length(), n = seq2.length();
        std::vector<std::vector<int>> H(m + 1, 
            std::vector<int>(n + 1, 0));

        int max_score = 0;
        int max_i = 0, max_j = 0;

        for (int i = 1; i <= m; i++) {
            for (int j = 1; j <= n; j++) {
                int match = H[i-1][j-1] + 
                    (seq1[i-1] == seq2[j-1] ? MATCH : MISMATCH);
                int delete_gap = H[i-1][j] + GAP;
                int insert_gap = H[i][j-1] + GAP;

                H[i][j] = std::max({0, match, delete_gap, insert_gap});

                if (H[i][j] > max_score) {
                    max_score = H[i][j];
                    max_i = i;
                    max_j = j;
                }
            }
        }

        return {max_score, "", ""};
    }
};
```
:::

## 性能优化技巧

::: {.tip-grid}
::: {.tip-card}
#### 使用 reserve() 预分配内存

```cpp
std::vector<int> kmers;
kmers.reserve(1000000);  // 避免多次重新分配
```
:::

::: {.tip-card}
#### 使用 string_view 避免拷贝

```cpp
#include <string_view>

// 零拷贝子串操作
std::string_view kmer(seq.data() + i, k);
```
:::

::: {.tip-card}
#### 并行处理（OpenMP）

```cpp
#pragma omp parallel for
for (int i = 0; i < n_reads; i++) {
    process_read(reads[i]);
}
```
:::
:::

## 编译与运行

```bash
# 基础编译
g++ -O3 -std=c++17 sequence_tool.cpp -o sequence_tool

# 启用 OpenMP 并行
g++ -O3 -fopenmp -std=c++17 parallel_tool.cpp -o parallel_tool

# 调试模式
g++ -g -O0 -std=c++17 debug.cpp -o debug
```

::: {.text-center .mt-4}
[查看 Linux 笔记](/linux.qmd){.btn .btn-outline-primary .me-2}
[查看 R 语言笔记](/r-lang.qmd){.btn .btn-outline-primary}
:::
